overlap_verdict: No source evidence of shared subjects or trial components; overlap appears to be drug/disease context only. DS060 is a pediatric/adult golimumab UC SuperSeries from adult phase 3 and pediatric phase 1B sources; DS083 is PROgECT/NCT01988961 phase 2a open-label golimumab UC. Public GEO sample IDs use different identifier structures, and no subject-level crosswalk was found.
recommended_overlap_notes: Golimumab UC context overlaps with DS083/PROgECT, but public GEO and publication evidence support distinct study sources: DS060/GSE87473 combines pediatric UC GSE87465 and adult UC/control GSE87466 golimumab trial-derived mucosal biopsy arrays, while DS083/GSE212849 is PROgECT/NCT01988961 screening colon biopsy profiling from 84 UC patients. No public subject-level crosswalk or shared sample identifiers were found; count as independent unless future controlled/source metadata demonstrates shared subjects.
